overview: Personalized hormone and wellness clinic offering advanced functional testing to identify root causes of hormone imbalance, fatigue, and metabolic issues. Services include hormone replacement therapy, FDA-approved weight-loss medications, peptides, and comprehensive lifestyle support.
highlights: Advanced functional testing and comprehensive lab panels
Predosed pens for weight-loss medications (no mixing or measuring)
Membership model with monthly check-ins and messaging support
targetAudience: Midlife adults seeking personalized hormone optimization and metabolic health support.
